routes.notes: The bulk of the dataset. Routes are LTFRB-franchised PUJ (jeepney) and PUB (city bus) routes, typed as route_type=3 in GTFS. Mix of T-series codes (T101, T102...) and named routes. All routes reflect pre-June-2020 franchises and do NOT cover: (a) MPUJ modern jeepney consolidation (555 routes), (b) UV Express consolidation (250 routes), (c) 2020-2024 route rationalization changes.
